## Summary

(What does this PR change?)

## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial / typo
- [ ] Clarification (PATCH)
- [ ] Additive change (MINOR)
- [ ] Breaking change (MAJOR — must reference an accepted change proposal)

## Change-proposal reference

(If applicable: link to the Issue or Discussion that drives this change. The RFC process is described in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).)

## Spec impact

- [ ] Affects spec text (`spec/`)
- [ ] Affects the function catalog (`spec/catalog/`)
- [ ] Affects diagrams or figures (`docs/`)
- [ ] No spec impact (governance, `.github`, README)

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] If a figure changed: the SVG validates clean and renders correctly
- [ ] If a section was added: cross-references reviewed
- [ ] DCO sign-off on every commit (`git commit -s`)
